## CBD-Infused Cosmetics

Discover the ultimate self-care experience with our CBD Cosmetics range. Our premium skincare and haircare products are infused with high-quality CBD and natural ingredients to provide a luxurious and relaxing experience.

Our carefully crafted products are designed to hydrate, soothe, and nourish your skin and hair, leaving you feeling rejuvenated and radiant.

Experience the power of CBD and indulge in the ultimate skincare experience with our CBD Cosmetics range.

[Shop CBD Cosmetics](https://maswitzerland.com/collections/cbd-cosmetics-natural-skincare-and-haircare)

![Image 4](https://ch.maswitzerland.com/cdn/shop/files/MA_Swizterland_Organic_Care_Range.png?v=1703083907&width=1500)

A collection of high-quality skincare products made with 100% vegan, 100% natural, and 100% bio ingredients

## CBD Organic Care

Our Organic Care range is enhanced with premium CBD to provide a unique and effective skincare experience.

Choose from five products in our Organic Care range, each made with the finest organic ingredients and enhanced with 200mg of CBD (for our Jojoba, Argan, and Aloe Vera oils) or 150mg of CBD (for our Shea Butter and Coconut Butter).

[Shop Organic Care](https://maswitzerland.com/collections/organic-care)

![Image 5](https://ch.maswitzerland.com/cdn/shop/files/MA_Switzerand_CBD_Skincare_Oil.png?v=1703083906&width=1500)

Premium, all-natural skincare oils designed to help you look and feel your best

## CBD Skincare Oils

Each of the five individual products in the range contains 10ml of oil with 1000mg of CBD from hemp broad-spectrum extract, which is rich in other cannabinoids, terpenes, and flavonoids.

At MA Switzerland, we believe that what you put on your skin is just as important as what you put in your body. That's why we use only the highest-quality ingredients in our Skincare CBD oils, including MCT oil, which is a fast-absorbing carrier oil that helps to deliver the CBD and other plant compounds to your skin quickly and effectively.

[Shop CBD Skincare Oils](https://maswitzerland.com/collections/cbd-skincare-oils)

![Image 6](https://ch.maswitzerland.com/cdn/shop/files/MA_Switzerland_Herbal_Teas.webp?v=1703083906&width=1500)

A range of premium quality herbal teas, each one expertly crafted using only the finest natural ingredients

## Cannabis Herbal Teas

Whether you're looking to relax and unwind after a long day, boost your energy levels, or promote a restful night's sleep, our Herbal Tea range has something for everyone.

Our indoor-grown hemp leaves are the cornerstone of each blend, adding a natural earthy flavor that perfectly complements the other ingredients.

With flavors ranging from the bright and refreshing MA CREATE to the soothing and calming MA RELAX, from the energizing and spicy MA PARTY to the sleep-promoting MA SLEEP, our Herbal Tea range has something to suit every taste and mood.

[Shop Herbal Teas](https://maswitzerland.com/collections/cbd-herbal-teas)

![Image 7](https://ch.maswitzerland.com/cdn/shop/files/MA_Switzerland_True_Cannabis_Flowers.webp?v=1703083905&width=1500)

Our CBD Cannabis are the result of intensive research, innovative production and a strict selection process of CBD-rich Cannabis varieties

## CBD Cannabis Flowers

Our CBD Cannabis Flowers are compact, fragrant, rich in properties and personality.

As the essence of True Cannabis, we offer our CBD Cannabis Flowers in a ceramic and bamboo jar which efficiently preserves the qualities of the cannabis flowers and ensures the best experience for every use. Learn more about our stylish and effective product packaging design.

[Shop Flowers](https://maswitzerland.com/collections/cannabis-flowers)

![Image 8](https://ch.maswitzerland.com/cdn/shop/files/MA_Switzerland_True_Cannabis_Pre-Rolled.webp?v=1703083905&width=1500)
